title_en: Grand Prix De Paris Card Moved Later In The Day Due To Forecasted High Temperatures
description: Post times for the G1 Cygames Grand Prix de Paris card at ParisLongchamp have been moved later in the day due to a forecasted heat wave in Paris, France Galop announced on Saturday morning. description: On pedigree, Ballydoyle's Haffner ( Justify ) has no right winning over seven furlongs but that's exactly what he was able to do in a key Newmarket maiden as he became his sire's 13th TDN Rising Star, Presented by Hagyard.
